event: View of the Village of Chartres
description: A sunlit view of a French village dominated by a round stone tower at left and tall Gothic church spires rising in the background. Tall poplar trees stand among the buildings. Small figures move along the dusty road in the foreground, and a horse-drawn cart is visible at right. The architecture includes medieval stone structures with warm-toned walls. The sky is pale blue with light clouds, and lush green foliage frames the scene.

_meta.title: The Village of Chartres, Eure-et-loir, France
